$comment: Source registry for mcc.vesperio.ai ingestion. status: 'verified' = URL/feed confirmed working; 'unverified' = drafted from knowledge, must be checked before first run; 'dead' after 3 consecutive failures (fail_count is maintained in code by scripts/harvest.ts for feed sources). feed_type rss_atom/api_json sources are fetched deterministically by scripts/harvest.ts into src/data/candidates.json before the sweep agent runs; html sources are fetched by the agent; a fetch_note marks a source our tools cannot read (JS shell, bot-block, stale mirror), which both the harvester and the agent skip. tier is legacy metadata (1 = primary-leaning, 2 = press); the SNR model classes each attached source per claim (see CLAUDE.md 'The SNR score' and prompts/update-items.md). Signal-tier sourcing is governed by signals.json, not this file.
